The '''Ministry of Justice Building''' was a fortress-like building in [[Pelek Baw/Legends|Pelek Baw]], [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]. It was headquarters for the [[Balawai militia]] and the [[Ministry of Justice (Balawai)|Ministry of Justice]], and included a [[Prison/Legends|prison]] and interrogation center in the basement.

{{Struct-stub}}
